Bash(cd "C:/Users/pc/my-site/backend" && python - << 'EOF'
from langchain_core.documents import Document
from rag.retriever import _rerank

def make_doc\(path, title\):
    return Document\(page_content="test", metadata={"path": path, "title": title}\)

# Simulate: Nav2 query returns Glossary first, ROS2 second
docs = [
    make_doc\("docs/90-glossary.md",          "Glossary"\),
    make_doc\("docs/10-ros2-intro.md",        "Module 2 — ROS2"\),
    make_doc\("docs/20-gazebo.md",            "Module 3 — Simulation"\),
    make_doc\("docs/10-ros2-nav2.md",         "Nav2 Navigation Stack"\),
]

reranked = _rerank\(docs, "how does nav2 work", k=4\)
print\("Nav2 query order:"\)
for d in reranked:
    print\(" ", d.metadata["title"]\)

print\(\)

reranked2 = _rerank\(docs, "define the term nav2 glossary", k=4\)
print\("Glossary query order:"\)
for d in reranked2:
    print\(" ", d.metadata["title"]\)
EOF)
